Re-Notice Of Hearing On Application For Right To Attach Order, Writ Of Attachment To Los Angeles County Dependency Attorney'S Inc
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Neil Daniel Eisenberg, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Jerome Sapiro
Robert F. Cohen, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Daniel Rooney, Darold M. Shirow, Los Angeles County Dependency Attorney's Inc.

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF JEROME SAPIRO's Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Los Angeles County Dependency Attorneys, Inc. is granted in the amount of $129,968.21. The court finds that this attachment proceeding is not amenable to arbitration. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
